subtitle: Tracking Florida's 2026 property tax elimination proposals and related reforms
current_status_summary: No tracked property tax elimination proposal appeared on the April 28, 2026 Special Session D bill-actions list reviewed for this tracker. CS/CS/HJR 203 passed the Florida House but died in Senate Appropriations during the regular session. The issue could return through a later special session or a new joint resolution.
latest_update: The April 28, 2026 Special Session D bill-actions list reviewed for this tracker did not include a tracked property tax elimination proposal.
expected_next: Watch for a new special session proclamation, new HJR or SJR filings, Senate committee movement, Department of State ballot records, or property-tax language tied to budget negotiations.

CS/CS/HJR 203 passed the Florida House but died in Senate Appropriations during the regular session.
The issue could return through a later special session or a new joint resolution.
The April 28, 2026 Special Session D bill-actions list reviewed for this tracker did not include a tracked property tax elimination proposal.
